publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-07-11 18:18:33 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Bulletins issued by the Philippines Army Headquarters during World War II, including a set of statements issued by General Douglas MacArthur.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Bulletins issued by the Philippines Army Headquarters during World War II, including a set of statements issued by General Douglas MacArthur.

defitem.label: Series I. Commonwealth of the Philippines, Army Headquarters, Manila. Bulletins, 1936-1937
Series II. Commonwealth of the Philippines, Army Headquarters. Bulletins, 1938-1941 . Incomplete
Series III. Commonwealth of the Philippines, Army Headquarters, Manila. General Order Bulletins, 1938-1941
Series IV. Commonwealth of the Philippines, Army Headquarters, Manila. Training Directives, 1937-1938
Series V. Notes prepared for the instruction of Philippine Civil Affairs personnel, 1944-1945
Series VI. Standing Operating Procedures, General Headquarters, Southwest Pacific Area, 1944-1945
Series VII. Government of the Philippine Islands, Department of the Interior and Labor Headquarters. Philippine Constabulary, Manila, 1933
Series VIII. Commonwealth of the Philippines, Army Headquarters, Manila. General Orders, 1936-1937 . Incomplete

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Philippines Army Headquarters Bulletins, #4405. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
